inputs.label: Mass of Known Substance
inputs.businessContext: The mass of the substance whose amount is known.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass of the substance whose amount is known.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Masse der Substanz, deren Menge bekannt ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la substance dont la quantité est connue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la sustancia cuya cantidad se conoce.

inputs.label: Molar Mass of Known Substance
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass (molecular weight) of the known substance.

label_i18n.fr: Masse molaire de la substance connue
label_i18n.es: Masa molar de la sustancia conocida

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar mass (molecular weight) of the known substance.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse molaire (poids moléculaire) de la substance connue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa molar (peso molecular) de la sustancia conocida.

inputs.label: Molar Mass of Unknown Substance
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass of the substance whose mass is to be calculated.

label_i18n.fr: Masse molaire de la substance inconnue
label_i18n.es: Masa molar de la sustancia desconocida

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar mass of the substance whose mass is to be calculated.
businessContext_i18n.de: Molmasse der Substanz, deren Masse berechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse molaire de la substance dont la masse doit être calculée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa molar de la sustancia cuya masa se va a calcular.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة المولية للمادة التي سيتم حساب كتلتها.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Known Substance
inputs.businessContext: Stoichiometric coefficient of the known substance in the balanced equation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stoichiometric coefficient of the known substance in the balanced equation.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stöchiometrischer Koeffizient der bekannten Substanz in der ausgeglichenen Gleichung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient stœchiométrique de la substance connue dans l'équation équilibrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente estequiométrico de la sustancia conocida en la ecuación balanceada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعامل المتكافئ للمادة المعروفة في المعادلة الموزونة.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Unknown Substance
inputs.businessContext: Stoichiometric coefficient of the unknown substance in the balanced equation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stoichiometric coefficient of the unknown substance in the balanced equation.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stöchiometrischer Koeffizient der unbekannten Substanz in der ausgeglichenen Gleichung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient stœchiométrique de la substance inconnue dans l'équation équilibrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente estequiométrico de la sustancia desconocida en la ecuación balanceada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعامل المتكافئ للمادة المجهولة في المعادلة الموزونة.
